#pragma once

#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace sample {

// Config holds application configuration.
struct Config {
    std::string name;
    int port = 8080;
    bool debug = false;
};

// Server is a simple HTTP server skeleton.
class Server {
  public:
    explicit Server(Config config) : config_(std::move(config)) {}

    void start() { running_ = true; }
    void stop() { running_ = false; }
    [[nodiscard]] bool is_running() const { return running_; }

    void add_route(std::string path) {
        routes_.push_back(std::move(path));
    }

    [[nodiscard]] const std::vector<std::string>& routes() const {
        return routes_;
    }

  private:
    Config config_;
    bool running_ = false;
    std::vector<std::string> routes_;
};

}  // namespace sample
